name: all of quantum mechanics is subsumed by Benlap-Dunn FDE Four Logic

phase_0.domain_name: all of quantum mechanics is subsumed by Benlap-Dunn FDE Four Logic

VINIT.justification: Uninitialized Hilbert space before any wavefunction or truth-value assignment

TANCH.justification: Hermetic boundary containing all four truth values and quantum state space

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism propagating state vector through time via Schrödinger equation

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism mapping state backward via Hermitian adjoint

CLINK.justification: Sequential composition of quantum gates and logical entailments

IMSCRIB.justification: Self-reference verifying eigenstate remains invariant under its own operator

FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication branching state vector into T-arm (true) and F-arm (false) truth-value paths

FFUSE.justification: Multiplication fusing T and F branches back into original state vector |ψ⟩

EVALT.justification: Affirmative branch evaluation locking state to |1⟩ eigenstate

EVALF.justification: Negative branch evaluation locking state to |0⟩ eigenstate

ENGAGR.justification: Bivalence paradox holding both T and F simultaneously without resolution

IFIX.justification: Irreversible fixation of measurement record into append-only history

phase_3.void_description: Uninitialized Hilbert space prior to state assignment
phase_3.both_description: Paraconsistent superposition holding T and F simultaneously

steps.domain_action: Initialize pre-quantum void state before wavefunction assignment
Apply unitary evolution to generate coherent superposition
Decompose superposition into T-arm (true) and F-arm (false) truth-value paths
Affirm T-branch as definite true eigenstate
Forward morphism propagates T-branch through logical entailment
Reconstitute T-branch into unified state vector
Re-branch unified state for paraconsistent evaluation
Affirm F-branch as definite false eigenstate
Reverse parity on F-branch for conjugate path
Reconstitute F-branch into unified state vector
Hold both T and F branches simultaneously in Bivalence paradox
Chain sequential measurement operators for state reduction
Verify self-adjoint identity of collapsed eigenstate
Lock first measurement record via irreversible decoherence
Append second measurement record to append-only history
Compose final logical entailment chain across branches
Self-reference check on final state vector
Seal system within Benlap-Dunn four-valued lattice boundary

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Logical entailment engine translating FDE rules to quantum gates
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Truth-value channel routing between superposition branches
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Append-only decoherence ledger storing irreversible collapses
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Unitary evolution clock dictating temporal ordering

phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — logical isomorphism preserves information across FDE lattice

open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

--   [4] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [5] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑙  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [6] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [7] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [8] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip

--   [13] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑠 → 𐑭  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [14] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑭 → 𐑱  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [15] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑭 → 𐑠  | composition — regime coherence

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def all_of_quantum_mechanics_is_subsumed_by_benlap_dunn_fde_four_logic_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize pre-quantum void state before wavefunction assignment)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Apply unitary evolution to generate coherent superposition)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (Decompose superposition into T-arm (true) and F-arm (false) truth-value paths) / FFUSE [5] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm T-branch as definite true eigenstate)
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Forward morphism propagates T-branch through logical entailment)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [5]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑙)  -- [5] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute T-branch into unified state vector)
  -- FSPLIT [6] (gran := 𐑚) (Re-branch unified state for paraconsistent evaluation) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙)  -- T-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.T)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Affirm F-branch as definite false eigenstate)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Reverse parity on F-branch for conjugate path))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute F-branch into unified state vector)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [10] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold both T and F branches simultaneously in Bivalence paradox)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑳 𐑠)  -- [11] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain sequential measurement operators for state reduction)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑭)  -- [12] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Verify self-adjoint identity of collapsed eigenstate)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑭)  -- [13] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Lock first measurement record via irreversible decoherence)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑭 𐑱)  -- [14] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Append second measurement record to append-only history)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑭 𐑠)  -- [15] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Compose final logical entailment chain across branches)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑡)  -- [16] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Self-reference check on final state vector)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑠 𐑼)  -- [17] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Seal system within Benlap-Dunn four-valued lattice boundary)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def all_of_quantum_mechanics_is_subsumed_by_benlap_dunn_fde_four_logic_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (all_of_quantum_mechanics_is_subsumed_by_benlap_dunn_fde_four_logic_protocol).restrictToEVALT
